text:
The following is a list of events as they take place in the world of Hunter × Hunter, starting from the past and heading towards the present storyline. Part of the information is unreliable, has been or may in the future be subjected to retcons. As is the case for the year the series is set in, in the event of contradictory information, the most recent version is taken to overwrite the other.

In the case of the Yorknew City arc, the calendar matches that of real-life year 1999, whereas the Succession Contest arc, set in in-universe 2001, follows the calendar of the year 2017. The specific days of the week were not retconned in the following timeline.

 Based on estimations that may or may not be correct

 Retconned out of canon

 Dubious canonicity (Databook or conflicting information)

Only the date is colored: The event happened as described, but the canonicity of the date is uncertain.
Both the date and the event are colored: Both the event and when it occurred are uncertain.

Prehistory

From January 1 st , 1999

{| class="article-table"
!Year
!Events
|- style="vertical-align: top;"
|January 1 st , 1999
|The Greed Island cartridges in Jeitsari's possession are donated to the Southernpiece Auction House. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 Originally January 1 st , 2000 (see Chapter 121), retconned as of Chapter 146. 
|}

Hunter Exam arc

Heavens Arena arc

Yorknew City arc

Greed Island arc

Chimera Ant arc

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Succession Contest arc

The first Zodiac meeting with Cheadle Yorkshire as Chairman (Chapter 340) seems to take place right after the day of her election, as the Zodiacs forgot that Pariston was no longer Vice Chairman and Cheadle had yet to choose hers. This would mean that Kakin's announcement of their expedition to the Dark Continent also was made the day after the election's conclusion, possibly explaining why, contrary to Ging's predictions in Chapter 331, Pariston did not delay the end of the election. Another implication is that Steiner, the IPA's Deputy Secretary, was tasked with studying Journey to the New World one month before then, which would require the V5 to have been aware of Kakin's project for at least that amount of time before it was announced. However, they did not seem to know about Beyond Netero's involvement, as supported by the timing of their request to the Hunter Association.

From this it can be inferred that events occurring in one chapter can be asynchronous, another example being Leorio and Kurapika's invitations to join the Zodiacs. Mizaistom Nana visited Beyond 35 days before the Black Whale's departure, scheduled for August 8 th . Mizaistom's conversation with Kurapika about moles then likely took place right after the 289 th Hunter Exam, whose schedule is known to have been modified to gather the necessary resources for the voyage. Leorio and Kurapika attended the meeting related to the Dark Continent one month before then, so around June 4 th , 2001.

Chapters in this arc are also known to be non-chronological and sometimes jump backwards in time (though are usually timestamped), most obviously seen in the events of Chapters 385, 386, and 387, or to a less obvious extent, the events from Chapters 389–400, which progress from Day 10 to Day 12 before jumping back to Day 10. Because of this, it should not be assumed that events happening sequentially also happen chronologically, neither should it be assumed that events occur exactly in the order listed below unless timestamped.

August 10 th , 2000

Before sunrise: Gon and Ging part ways. 
At sunrise: Gon watches the Small-billed Swans take flight with Kite's group. Probable inconsistency. 
Ging and Pariston leave the Zodiacs. 
Nasubi announces an expedition to the Dark Continent, which is to be led by Beyond. 
Steiner, the Deputy Secretary of the IPA, speaks at the V5 summit and convinces the V5 to support Nasubi's project. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 342 
The V5 (in reality Steiner) commission the Hunter Association to hunt Beyond. 
The Zodiacs gather and watch Netero's DVD. 
Beyond hands himself over to the Zodiacs. 
Ging reaches Beyond's lair. 
Gon discovers that he cannot produce any aura. 
Ging begins to teach the members of the Dark Continent Expedition Team about the unofficial voyages and Don Freecss. 
Gon phones Ging about his inability to muster any aura while preparing to go back to Whale Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 345 

Between August 11 th , 2000, and Early June, 2001

Gon arrives home. 
September 8 th : Nobunaga's 30 th birthday. 
December 2000: 4 th Prince of the Kakin Empire Tserriednich Hui Guo Rou anonymously uploads a video depicting his collection of Scarlet Eyes on a darknet site. 
March 3 rd : Leorio's 21 st birthday. 
April 4 th : Kurapika's 19 th birthday. 
May 5 th : Gon's 14 th birthday. 
Cheadle offers the Zodiac's Boar position to Leorio, who accepts and recommends Kurapika for the Rat position. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 343 
Mizaistom is sent to invite Kurapika. 
Kurapika accepts Mizaistom's request to join the Zodiacs and accompany them to the Dark Continent in exchange for information on the owner of a large amount of his clan's Scarlet Eyes. 

Around June 4 th , 2001

After sunset: Tserriednich skins two women. 
Cheadle makes Beyond sign a contract she drew up. 
Kurapika and Leorio attend the Zodiac meeting about the upcoming expedition. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

July 4 th , 2001

The 289 th Hunter Exam ends. Through recordings of the examinees, Kurapika identifies many spies or companions of Beyond who are then prevented from passing, but lets Mizaistom know that other spies may remain. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 348 
Muherr and his team return to the Dark Continent Expedition Team's lair, having failed the 289 th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 
After sunset (in Kakin): 1 st Prince Benjamin Hui Guo Rou tells 4 th Prince Tserriednich Hui Guo Rou that their father King Nasubi Hui Guo Rou intends to declare the sole survivor of the succession contest his official heir. 
Theta phones Tserriednich to inform him that she, Salkov, Myuhan, Danjin, and another bodyguard had passed the 289 th Hunter Exam and become Provisional Hunters. 
Mizaistom and Kurapika identify Saiyu, the Monkey Zodiac, as a mole for Pariston. 
Mizaistom confronts Beyond about his knowledge of a mole. Beyond's lack of knowledge about Saiyu's existence is interpreted to mean that Pariston is plotting to use Saiyu to take Beyond back sometime in the future. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 349 
Anonymous requests for bodyguards are put up on Kakin's website by 6 th Prince Tyson Hui Guo Rou, 7 th Prince Luzurus Hui Guo Rou, 10 th Prince Kacho Hui Guo Rou, 12 th Prince Momoze Hui Guo Rou, 13 th Prince Marayam Hui Guo Rou, and 14 th Prince Woble Hui Guo Rou. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 350 

Between July 4 th and August 7 th , 2001

Before July 8 th : A little over one month before August 8 th , as per Chapter 360. The 14 Kakin Princes undergo the Seed Urn Ceremony. 
Kurapika hires Basho, Biscuit, Hanzo, Izunavi, and Melody to apply to the six listings for bodyguards on Kakin's website to maximize his chances of meeting Tserriednich. 
Izunavi is hired to guard Tyson, Basho to guard Luzurus, Melody to guard Kacho, Hanzo to guard Momoze, Biscuit to guard Marayam, and Kurapika to guard Woble.
At 19:00: Basho, Hanzo, and Kurapika meet with their employers. 
19:00–19:09: Woble's mother 8 th Queen Oito Hui Guo Rou reveals the Succession Contest to Kurapika and Kurapika shares his terms. Oito and Kurapika come to a mutual agreement. 
July 7 th : Killua's 14 th birthday. 
July 10 th : Steiner, the the Deputy Secretary of the International Permit Agency (IPA), is assigned to evaluating the risks of the upcoming expedition to the Dark Continent. 
Chrollo and Hisoka have a deathmatch at the Heavens Arena, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 351 where Hisoka dies and is resurrected shortly after by his post-mortem Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 357 Hisoka kills Kortopi and Shalnark. If the non-linearity of the previous arc is assumed to continue, the battle may have taken place at any point after Nasubi’s announcement. 

August 7 th , 2001 (Sat)

The eve (of departure) festival takes place. The Kakin royal family is televised being flown into the voyage ship. Festivities and celebrations are held in multiple places across the country. The Kakin royal family mingle with their guests at a banquet in the banquet hall of Tier 1 on the Black Whale. The staff of the Princes make their preparations for the voyage (briefings for bodyguards, room preparation for servants, etc.) Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 
Mizaistom informs Kurapika about the messy state of the lower tiers. 
Kurapika senses aura coming from Woble's direction 

August 8 th , 2001 (Sun) (Day 1)

At 12:00: 37 hours and 30 minutes before 01:27 on the third day, as per Chapter 374. The Black Whale leaves the harbor, and the departure ceremony begins. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 359 The Black Whale's departure horn is sounded, signaling the official start of the succession contest. The Kakin royal family mingle with guests at the Ceremonial Hall. 
Between 12:15 and 12:30: Woble's guard Woody is killed by the user of Silent Majority.
Several of Woble's guards leave to receive Woble and Oito from the ceremony. Four more of Woble's guards are found killed upon their return. Two of Woble's guards are restrained. Kurapika sees Nen beasts in Room 1014 and reveals the existence of Nen beasts over the emergency channel. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 360 
Around 14:00: The two restrained guards are killed. One more guard is killed. Sayird is taken into custody. Woble's staff is reduced to Kurapika, Bill, Shimano, and Sandra. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 361 
7 th Queen Sevanti moves mosst of her daughter 12 th Prince Momoze's guards to her son 13 th Prince Marayam's escort. 
Tserriednich begins learning Nen under Theta's tutelage. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 362 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 363 
Around 18:00: Benjamin sends his private soldiers to guard all the other Princes and spy on them. His private soldier Vincent heads to Room 1014 and immediately kills Sandra. Vincent is subdued by Kurapika and Bill and takes a suicide pill. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 364 
Around 19:00: Simultaneously, 1 st Prince Benjamin, 3 rd Prince Zhang Lei Hui Guo Rou, and 5 th Prince Tubeppa Hui Guo Rou phone Room 1014, and Vincent's replacement Babimyna waits to be let into Room 1014. 
At 19:15: Kurapika meets with Zhang Lei in Room 1003. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 365 
Around 20:00: One hour after the call (see Chapter 365). Maor, 5 th Prince Tubeppa Hui Guo Rou's Captain of the Guards, heads over to Room 1014. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 
Kurapika's meeting with Zhang Lei concludes. Zhang Lei temporarily assigns guards Sakata and Hashito to assist Kurapika and guard Woble. 
2 nd Queen Duazul Hui Guo Rou's guard Slakka is instructed by a Queen to follow Sakata and Hashito. 
Kurapika demonstrates Nen to Sakata, Hashito, Slakka, Maor, and Nen user Babimyna by having Bill pretend to control a cockroach that Oito is secretly controlling. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 364 
Bill lets the cockroach escape through the air vents, which Babimyna correctly identifies as attempted reconnaissance. 
Kurapika tells the new guards present of his plan to offer each Prince the chance to participate in a two-week series of lessons to learn Nen. 
Oito navigates the cockroach to Room 1013, notes that there are more guards than normal there, and guesses that it is because guards were shifted from Momoze to Marayam. 
Around 21:00: Three hours since the activation of Emperor Time to transfer Little Eye to Oito. Kurapika states that Emperor Time has been active for three hours, which is in fact a miscalculation, since it was activated in Chapter 361, roughly two hours after departure: what occurred around that time was the use of Stealth Dolphin to give Sayird’s ability to Oito. Oito finishes recon on Marayam's room and pilots the cockroach to Room 1012. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 
Oito witnesses Momoze's murder and alerts Kurapika. 
Kurapika and Oito pass out. 
As Tserriednich learns Gyo, Tserriednich's Guardian Spirit Beast cuts Theta's left cheek for lying to him. 

August 9 th , 2001 (Mon) (Day 2)

Around 06:00: 12 hours since the activation of Emperor Time to transfer Little Eye to Oito (16 hours since the real activation to steal Sayird’s ability). Kurapika awakens, and so does Oito shortly after. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 
After sunrise: Little Eye is forcibly deactivated by Tserriednich's Guardian Spirit Beast. 
At 09:00: Kurapika gives his first Nen lesson.
The Silent Majority user possesses Kacho's servant Loberry with Silent Majority and kills Barrigen with the ability when Loberry causes a distraction. Loberry is arrested, and Room 1010 is placed under surveillance for three days. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 370 
At 09:45: Kurapika refuses Mushaho the right to carry weapons and asks the participants whether they wish to continue or not. He uses the time given for the participants to decide to covertly eliminate his allies from the list of suspects. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 
At 10:00: Kurapika's Nen lesson resumes. 
At 10:01: Hanzo summons his double. Hanzo gets Tuffdy to admit to killing Momoze, before killing Tuffdy. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 
Phinks, Franklin, Feitan, and Nobunaga beat up three Buor Family thugs. The Spiders use them to learn about the three Kakin families, and get them to search for people of Hisoka's height. 
At 12:30: Kurapika's first lesson ends. Kurapika, 9 th Prince Halkenburg Hui Guo Rou's guard Yuhirai, and Sakata discuss the events in Halkenburg's room the previous day and agree to form an alliance between Zhang Lei, Tubeppa, Halkenburg, and the lower-ranking Princes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 373 
Hanzo returns to Room 1013 and finds Room 1013 empty, except for Marayam's Guardian Spirit Beast. He goes to Room 1014 to seek Kurapika's help. Room 1014 receives a call from Room 1013, and Kurapika and Hanzo conclude that Room 1013 has been transported by a Nen ability. 
In the evening: 2 nd Prince Camilla Hui Guo Rou kills Musse and attacks Benjamin, but is unsuccessful and is restrained by his team. Musse successfully attaches his Secret Window onto Camilla before dying, and Benjamin inherits Musse's ability. 
Nasubi has a moment of silence in the Princes' Burial Chamber for Momoze. 

August 10 th , 2001 (Tue) (Day 3)

At 01:27: 11 th Prince Fugetsu Hui Guo Rou's Guardian Spirit Beast manifests as door. She travels through the tunnel behind the door and appears in Kacho's bed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 374 
Biscuit and Hanzo offer to teach the staff in the true Room 1013 Nen. Belerainte confirms for Room 1013's occupants that Room 1013 has been transported. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 375 
At 09:00: Kurapika begins his second lecture. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 
Zhang Lei first discovers the coins produced by his Guardian Spirit Beast while he eats breakfast. 
In Room 1009, Halkenburg and his men have a moment of silence for Momoze. This action produces a large amount of aura, felt in Room 1001. Halkenburg makes his first visit to Nasubi with a letter. 
Camilla and Benjamin go to court over Musse and Camilla's attack on Benjamin and are confined to the VVIP area until Musse is found. 
At 10:05: During the second Nen lesson, Myuhan is killed by Silent Majority. 
Tserriednich does a Water Divination Test and discovers he is a Specialist. 
Kacho gives Melody a device to secretly communicate with her. 

August 11 th , 2001 (Wed) (Day 4)

Before sunrise: Fugetsu investigates her door's abilities. 
Kacho arranges for Melody to perform at the Sunday banquet, and her and Fugetsu to perform together after Melody's performance. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 377 
The Phantom Troupe gather to share information before dispersing at the Cha-R Mafia Family's request. 
Shizuku and Bonolenov team up with Chrollo, where Chrollo asks Bonolenov to disguise himself as Hisoka and be found by the Mafia, so that the Mafia would send him away from their territory and let the Phantom Troupe search for the real Hisoka with the mistaken belief that they could not find him. 
Cha-R boss Brocco Li phones Xi-Yu boss Onior Longbao about the Phantom Troupe and the two order their underbosses to find Hisoka. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 
Heil-Ly boss Morena infects her 22 followers with her Contagion, allowing them to gain Nen abilities by killing people. Luini kills 20 people in Tier 3, awakening his Nen ability. Luini asks Cashew to leave hints to test the Kakin Military's investigative abilities. 
Nobunaga, Phinks, and Feitan head to the warehouse in Tier 5 to retrieve their weapons. Luini kills the warehouse guards to try and instigate them into fighting the Cha-R Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 379 so that he could gain access to a secret door in the Cha-R hideout Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 380 
Mizaistom questions Cashew. 
Nobunaga, Phinks, and Feitan encounter Cha-R underboss Ken'i Wang. Franklin is approached by Cha-R advisor Ittoku. The Spiders agree to join the Cha-R guard rotation and to kill Luini in exchange for seeing what is behind the door Luini wanted access to. 
At 10:00: The Kakin military begins to sweep the lower decks for a dangerous stowaway. 
Illumi and Kalluto are caught in Tier 3. 
Fugetsu is found on Tier 3 and Mizaistom is informed. He leaves the search to interview Fugetsu. 
A proxy relays instructions from Mizaistom has instructions relayed to Melody in Room 1010, informing her of Kacho and Fugetsu's likely escape attempt, and asks her to support Keeney in addressing the matter. The call began with a time check, which was revealed in Chapter 381 to be the key to understanding a hidden message within Mizaistom's instructions, to support instead of hinder the Princes' attempt at escaping. The time check given was 13:44, but it's possible that the call was not made at exactly 13:44. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 381 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 383 

August 12 th , 2001 (Thu) (Day 5)

Mizaistom escorts Fugetsu from the Central Police Station on Tier 3 to Room 1011. Room 1010's investigator Kaiser informs Fugetsu she is placed under surveillance for 72h. 
Melody performs a preview for Seiko and Kaiser. The performance inspires Seiko to arrange for her full performance during the banquet to played through Tier 1's speakers.
At 16:00: The supreme court's surveillance on Room 1010 ends. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 382 
Rihan's Predator consumes Salé-salé Hui Guo Rou's Guardian Spirit Beast. Rihan trades guard shifts with Yushohi. 
At 20:00: An announcement communicates that the dangerous stowaway has been captured. 

August 13 th , 2001 (Fri) (Day 6)

Morning: Halkenburg forces his way into his father's room, and his Nen ability awakens. 
Halkenburg uses his Nen ability for the first time, using it on Shikaku. As a result, his guard Sumidori possesses Shikaku, and Sumidori's body enters a state of sleep. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 386 This is the second time a large amount of aura is sent throughout Tier 1. 
Night: Speculative but likely time. Salé-salé is killed by Yushohi. 

August 14 th , 2001 (Sat) (Day 7)

At 22:30: Cha-R vice boss Tajao enters the Cha-R's hideout through the door Luini wanted access to, and the Spiders volunteer to kill Morena in exchange for his help in getting permission to search Tier 4 for Hisoka. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 384 
Halkenburg hypothesizes several possibilities for the workings of his ability and begins to test them out. The exact time this occurs is ambiguous. While initially it was assumed to be on Day 9, additional information revealed about the consciousness of possessed people in Chapter 404 make it illogical for this to be on Day 9, and this scene likely happened sometime on Day 6 or 7, 8 at the very latest. Shikaku's body's suicide remains on Day 9. 
Tserriednich's guards clean up a mass of blood and guts in his room. Likely the Heil-Ly's uncontactable butler mentioned in Chapter 394. He confirms with an unknown party over the phone that Morena is not in her VVIP room on Tier 1. He sends an order for his soldiers on the lower tiers to search Morena's hideout. 
Tserriednich unconsciously conjures a jester/scarecrow-like Nen beast. 
Theta begins training Tserriednich in Zetsu. 

August 15 th , 2001 (Sun) (Day 8)

At 19:35: Theta instructs Tserriednich to try and maintain his Zetsu for one hour through distractions. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 385 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 387 
Tserriednich discovers his Nen ability. 
At 20:00: The banquet commences. 
At 20:59: Melody's performance is introduced, to be played over the speaker system throughout Tiers 1 and 2. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 383 Theta shoots Tserriednich in a parallel present. Melody gives the listeners of her performance a vision of a beautiful landscape. Theta and Tserriednich freeze, unsure of how to respond to the sudden vision. 
Within the next three minutes: Keeney guides Kacho and Fugetsu to the ship's lifeboats and, attempting to absolve them of responsibility if caught, shoots himself after seeing their lifeboat off. 
At 21:03:37: Melody's performance ends. 
Theta hears Tserriednich reappear behind her. Theta loses consciousness after being confronted by Tserriednich's Guardian Spirit Beast. 
Kacho is killed by the conditions of the Seed Urn ceremony. 
Kacho's Guardian Spirit Beast manifests as a copy of her. "Kacho" returns with Fugetsu to Room 1011. 
Before 21:18: Theta recovers consciousness. Theta discovers an "infection" has spread from the wound on her cheek to across the left half of her face. 

August 16 th , 2001 (Mon) (Day 9)

Kaiser holds Melody in custody under suspicion of involvement in Kacho and Fugetsu's escape attempt to protect Melody from the other Princes. He lets her know that both "Kacho" and Fugetsu are also at the Justice Bureau on Tier 2 to answer questions. 
Halkenburg's aura is perceived for the third time. Basho in Room 1007 identifies that it comes from Room 1009. Kurapika and Bill in Room 1014 can only narrow it down to Rooms 1005, 1007, or 1009. Sometime between Days 5 and 9, Rihan is assigned to guard Tubeppa. 
"Shikaku" commits suicide in front of Room 1007, and the rumbling stops. "Sumidori" awakens. 
At 10:00: Kanjidol returns to recount the events surrounding Shikaku's death to Benjamin and Balsamilco Might and identifies the rumbling aura with Halkenburg for them. Balsamilco sends him back with instructions to observe the actions of Room 1007's occupants closely, and Basho begins to observe Kanjidol. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 
Kurapika initiates Ladiolus, Maor, Yuri, and Satobi with Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 388 
After Maor returns from Room 1014: Tubeppa passes a thumb drive to Heisen and instructs him to follow up on its contents. 

August 17 th , 2001 (Tue) (Day 10)

At 11:30: Halkenburg's aura can be felt for the fourth time from Rooms 1014 and Benjamin's residence in the VVIP area when he uses his ability on Vict. 
At an unknown time after: Halkenburg's group test his ability, specifically what happens when the body of the possessor dies before the body of the possessed dies. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 404 
Because of Balsamilco's report, Halkenburg is arrested by the Ministry of Justice under suspicion of premeditated murder of Benjamin's men. 
Sarahell decides to test the strength of Camilla's men's curses on Woble during Kurapika's second round of Nen lessons. 
At 11:45: Kurapika invites Longhi into Room 1014's master bedroom to have her Nen awakened. 
Longhi uses her Moonlight Act to simultaneously prove that she is not the Silent Majority user and to establish the contract between Tubeppa and Woble. 
Longhi reveals that Beyond is her biological father, and has fathered several children lurking among the personal guards who he turned into "curse sacrifices" of varying strengths. Longhi speculates that Beyond has done so because he has a child among the 14 Princes, and wishes to use the "strong curse sacrifices" on the other Princes. 
Longhi explains the truce Tubeppa seeks with Woble, a peace treaty penalizing Woble's side with one week of forced Zetsu if they attacked Tubeppa's side, and rewarding them with a one-time use of Moonlight Act if fulfiled. The truce would be renewed in 1 week at 9 a.m. on Sunday (Day 15), and the contract expires if Tubeppa withdraws. 
Longhi adds an extra stipulation to the contract for Kurapika to sign, that he would identify who Beyond's child among the 14 Princes is, before Tubeppa withdraws or before two princes remain. Longhi promises to give Kurapika this stipulation as a contract between him and her should he wish to continue, with the same rewards. If Beyond's Prince-child is identified, Longhi requests to be the one who kills Beyond's them. 
Kurapika agrees to a peace treaty with Tubeppa and Longhi's additional terms. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 400 
Longhi steps out of Room 1014's master bedroom and demonstrates a natural flow of Nen. Furykov, having expected her to be responsible for the deaths of Barrigen and Myuhan, is confused and wonders what happened, given the lack of indication of a battle, and Longhi looking like she was crying. 
Kurapika invites Tenftory into Room 1014's master bedroom to have his Nen awakened. 
By the end of Nen lessons: Kurapika awakens all of his students to Nen. 
At 13:30: Tenftory reports to Zhang Lei. Maor and Longhi report to Tubeppa. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 402 
In Room 1003:
Tenftory reports the status of the classes thus far and his Nen awakening to Zhang Lei, and lets him know that he can see his Nen beast. Zhang Lei rewards him with a coin. 
Tenftory lets Zhang Lei know about Tubeppa and Woble's willingness to defer the throne to him if they are the final three Princes remaining, in exchange for Sakata and Hashito remaining with Woble indefinitely. Zhang Lei rewards him with a second coin, and tells him to keep it with him at all times. 
Coventoba eavesdrops on their conversation. Shortly after, he notices the number on his coin has changed from a '1' to a '10'. He sees that Tenftory's coin has a '1' on it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 390 
In Room 1005:
Maor and Longhi tell Tubeppa about Kurapika's acceptance of her truce on condition that Woble and Oito accompany him to Room 1005 whenever he comes over. Maor also tells Tubeppa that Zhang Lei's guards had demanded to be present as well for information sharing. Rihan eavesdrops while standing guard. 
Tubeppa decides that Tserriednich does not care much about collaborating with her. She tells Maor and Longhi to have the attendants of the next class impress their closeness with Zhang Lei's team on Benjamin's men. 
Tubeppa's Guardian Spirit Beast appears. Rihan notes this and guesses that her Guardian Spirit Beast has conditions to meet before appearing. 
Somewhere unknown: Balsamilco tests a gas emission device hidden in his shoe and loads a pathogenic cartridge into it, preparing to eliminate Halkenburg during their trial. 
Zhang Lei concludes his beast will not help him win and meets with Onior to ask about Nen and Nasubi's succession war. 
Under Onior's orders, Hinrigh Biganduffno, Lynch Fullbokko, and Zakuro Custard begin searching Tier 3 for Morena and Hisoka. Onior allows the Spiders to search Tier 4 for Hisoka. 
Hinrigh fights and kills Padaille. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 391 Maizan appears to address the commotion and sells Hinrigh information on Morena's location. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 392 
Lynch and Zakuro come across Bonolenov disguised as Hisoka and are knocked out by him. 
Bonolenov impersonates Zakuro to speak with Lynch when she comes to. After he confirms that she knows that he is disguising himself as Hisoka, he kills her and hides her body, before disguising himself as her and telling Zakuro that "Hisoka" was going to the cinemas. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 405 
Nobunaga kills Luini and gives his body to the Cha-R. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 393 
Hinrigh gets "Hisoka"'s location from Zakuro and convinces Hisoka (Bonolenov in disguise) to move to Tier 1. 
Hinrigh finds Maizan waiting with Ken'i and the Cha-R. Maizan brings them all to Room 3101. 
Maizan steps into Room 3101 and disappears. Hinrigh and Ken'i decide to let the Phantom Troupe deal with the trap. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 394 
Kaiser proposes a plan to kill the higher princes to "Kacho" and Melody. 
Worried about special martial law being declared, Kaiser gives Steiner a button to press in case Benjamin's men or the Royal Army come to the Justice Bureau. 
"Kacho" notices Fugetsu's mental state is deteriorating, and Kaiser arranges for Melody to check on her. Melody confirms she is in a state of near-Zetsu. 
Melody speaks with Zhang Lei and accepts his Guardian Spirit Beast's coin, incorrectly believing Zhang Lei himself made it. Melody speaks with Vantine and declines his invitation to Tserriednich's quarters. 
Before 14:00: Beyond asks his guard Tiger Zodiac Kanzai to arrange a meeting with an unspecified person for him. 

August 18 th , 2001 (Wed) (Day 11)

At 06:00: "Kacho" shows Melody a picture of a mark on Fugetsu's back. They guess that she has been drugged, making her believe she can use Magical Worm more than once a day. When they speak with Kaiser, they suggest that Luzurus or his Guardian Spirit Beast were behind this. 
"Kacho", Melody, and Kaiser make a plan for Fugetsu to enter the quarters of various Princes so she can connect to their rooms with her Magical Worm if needed, by having "Kacho" write a letter to be passed off as her final message to each Prince. 
They decide to have the letters contain information that the Ministry of Justice had gathered on each Prince to further shake up the Princes. 
Between 06:00 and 08:50: Kaiser, several IPA members, and several soldiers escort Fugetsu around Tier 1 to deliver her letters to the remaining Princes. They deliver the letters to all Princes except Tserriednich (rejected), Halkenburg (ill), and Marayam (rejected). Kurapika receives a personal letter from Melody. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 403 
At 06:45: Balsamilco makes his way to the Justice Department Prosecution and Courthouse Area Entrance. 
Inside the building, he sees Vict. "Vict" engages and distracts Balsamilco to let Halkenburg successfully use his ability on Balsamilco from around a corner, powered by a group of civilian supporters. Halkenburg ends up being the one possessing Balsamilco's body. 
Before the attack on Balsamilco: Halkenburg calls and speaks with Unma and lets her know of his plans. Unma tells Halkenburg, her son, how proud she is of him. 
Approximately 07:50: Benjamin speaks with the Justice Bureau and learns that the trial has been postponed. He suspects that Balsamilco has been manipulated by Halkenburg's ability. 
Balsamilco gets on the phone and informs Benjamin that despite how guilty he looks, he would meet Halkenburg and his supporters, and promises not to return until he can prove that his mission has been completed. Balsamilco promises to get results within the day. 
Benjamin informs Butch that the rumbling was an attack on Balsamilco, and has him notify Tiers 2 and 3 that he may declare martial law. He is notified by another guard that Kaiser and Fugetsu have something to pass him, and lets them in to try and foster a good relationship with the Justice Bureau. 
The letter from Kacho to Benjamin says that Unma is Halkenburg's mother. Kacho also requests for Benjamin's help in protecting Fugetsu. When Benjamin reads the letter, he pretends that it contains nothing important, but hints that he hopes to enact martial law on the ship. He notes the low-level spirits surrounding Fugetsu and guesses she will not last a week. 
Benjamin gets a call from Balsamilco (who, unbeknownst to him, is possessed by Halkenburg himself) reporting mission (Halkenburg's elimination) completion and that results would be delivered by that night. 
After Zhang Lei receives and reads the letter Kacho wrote for him from Fugetsu, he tries to figure out how his coins functions. He does not make progress with his men and asks them to call Room 1014 instead. 
Luzurus hands his letter back to Kaiser after reading it and pretends to not be interested in its contents. He considers that Kacho might have wanted to pit him against Tserriednich while getting Benjamin to protect Fugetsu and decides not to act hastily. 
As Fugetsu leaves Room 1007, Basho passes her a good luck charm that wards off the low-level spirits clinging to her. 
Kurapika notifies Oito that he would begin the second round of Nen lessons the next day, and asks her permission to make the letter she received (not his letter) public. 
Steiner meets with Kaiser and reports that in addition to the people Halkenburg had warned would faint, Justice Bureau staff member Worio Bay had passed out in a similar manner, albeit at a different time and place. 
Kaiser meets Worio in order to learn about Halkenburg's ability before he risks meeting Halkenburg in person. Kaiser learns that Halkenburg had expected him to be suspicious of him, and that Halkenburg had predicted his own death soon. Kaiser then visits Halkenburg, who is unconscious in bed. 
At 08:50: After Fugetsu finishes her rounds and returns, she sleeps. "Kacho", Melody, and Kaiser make plans to carry out Luzurus' elimination using Fugetsu getting treated in the infirmary as an alibi while they use their abilities to knock Luzurus out and force him to ride a lifeboat out of the ship. They plan to execute this the night of the next day. 
Melody talks about the rumbling on Tier 2 and guesses that it was either Halkenburg's ability or his Guardian Spirit Beast's ability. She asks Kaiser for information, finding it important to know whether him collapsing was intended or unintentional. 
Melody hopes to pass Halkenburg his letter soon, containing information on Benjamin's secret, Tserriednich's depravity, and Halkenburg's own birth. 
Kurapika goes to Room 1003 at Zhang Lei's request to assist him with understanding the coins produced by his Guardian Spirit Beast. He is accompanied by Oito and Woble. 
From the information shared, Kurapika theorizes that Zhang Lei's Guardian Spirit Beast allows those gifted coins to accumulate Nen, increasing in value by a factor of ten, every ten days. He keeps his theory that Coventoba had kept one coin a secret from those in the room. He also keeps his hypothesis that Zhang Lei's Guardian Spirit Beast would be able to pseudo-coercively manipulate those who are gifted coins a secret. 
Tserriednich manages to reduce the time he takes to activate Zetsu down to 3.496 seconds, but is frustrated and determines to keep going until he gets it below 1 second. 
Sometime in the afternoon: Balsamilco (possessed by Halkenburg) administers TSK-17 to Halkenburg's physical body. 
"Halkenburg" is rushed to the hospital on Tier 3 and is seen to by a team of doctors, including Cheadle and Leorio. 
"Balsamilco" accompanies "Halkenburg". He calls Benjamin afterward to report, and reaffirms that results will be delivered later that night. 
Benjamin sends the royal and military medical teams to Halkenburg's sick body to take over responsibility for watching over "Halkenburg" from Cheadle and Leorio's team. 
Kurapika makes plans to keep Woble safe after he learns that Camilla has decided to send a single guard to attend the second round of Nen lessons. 

August 19 th , 2001 (Thurs) (Day 12)

In the early hours (roughly 12 hours after TSK-17 was administered to Halkenburg): Balsamilco (possessed by Halkenburg) takes a sedative with an effect for 10 hours. Not long afterward, Halkenburg's physical body dies. 
09:00: Kurapika's second round of Nen lessons begins. 
Bonolenov comes across Hisoka at the Casino. He discards his Hisoka disguise and disguises himself as the Shadow Beast, Owl.
Hinrigh confirms that the Heil-Ly are warping around and updates Ken'i and Borksen's companions. 
While inspecting the trap in Room 3101, Nobunaga has a flashback to the origins of the Phantom Troupe. 
Nobunaga and Hinrigh step into the trap in Room 3101 to see where it takes them. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 398 
Ken'i introduces Hinrigh to the Spiders outside Room 3101, who proposes a plan to find the Heil-Ly base. He swallows a transmitter, passes the receiver to Phinks, and lets himself be teleported by the trap. Nobunaga joins him. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 398 
Nobunaga follows Hinrigh into the trap and the two find Heil-Ly members where they are teleported. They engage the Heil-Ly and are forced out by Yokotani. Hinrigh successfully hides the transmitter in the Heil-Ly base before he is forced out. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 399 
(Ten minutes after being forcibly teleported back): Nobunaga regroups with Phinks and Feitan. They confirm the Heil-Ly base is on Tier 2. 
An announcement is made on Tier 3 announcing the death of Halkenburg in the early hours of Day 12. The announcement informs listeners that Halkenburg's body would be transferred from Tier 3 to Tier 1 at noon, and tells those who wish to pay their respects to gather at the Central Staircase Square. 
Tajao officially asks Nobunaga, Phinks, and Feitan to crush the Heil-Ly. He tells the spiders that the Cha-R and Xi-Yu would fully support them. 
Before they begin to crush the Heil-Ly, Phinks and Feitan follow Nobunaga to the Cha-R family hideout on Tier 5 for him to confirm something with Tajao and Ken'i. 
Nobunaga, Phinks, and Feitan learn of Morena and convince Tajao that the current Heil-Ly on board are not acting as the Kakin mafia. 
Tajao asks the spiders to crush the Heil-Ly, and Ken'i worries about the spiders finding Morena sooner than expected and guesses that she might have to use the "joker" soon. 
Tajao brings Phinks, Feitan, and Nobunaga to a space between the main Tiers of the Black Whale and its hull. Nobunaga turns around after Tajao confirms his suspicions that the Heil-Ly might be posing as sewage processing subcontractors and luring people to the waste processing area between Tiers 4 and 5 to find their prey, and also to not have to surrender his newly-made katana. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 406 
Morena lets her underlings know about the funeral procession for Halkenburg. Dogman and Sodom head out to find the person that Morena seeks. 
Shortly before the funeral procession: Lynch's body is found by soldiers during a final sweep before the procession. 
Hinrigh reunites with Zakuro, and a Xi-Yu Family underling lets them know that Lynch has been killed and her body has been found 
Hinrigh and Zakuro arrive at the possibility that someone is pretending to be Hisoka in order to trick the Xi-Yu into thinking that Hisoka has been found and let their people freely search for Hisoka in vain 
Roughly two hours after Hinrigh and Nobunaga find the Heil-Ly secret hideout: The transmitter that Hinrigh transforms into an oyster and hides loses its aura and reverts back to a transmitter 
12:00: The funeral procession for "Halkenburg" to the morgue on Tier 1 begins at Tier 3, and heads to Tier 2 via the Central Stairwell. 
Chrollo wanders through the crowd while he uses his Love Dial 6700 to try and locate his "ideal partner". He gets incensed with thoughts of revenge against Hisoka and turns his thoughts to his original plan for the Black Whale, to steal Kakin's three imperial treasures so that he can upgrade Skill Hunter and obtain an ability to kill Hisoka. 
Before 13:00: Halkenburg's coffin is carried from Tier 3 to Tier 2 Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 407 
Around 13:00: Borksen's companions note that she has gone missing and her last contact with them was roughly 30 minutes earlier. 
Borksen regains consciousness in the Heil-Ly Family secret hideout and finds herself facing Morena and surrounded by five of Morena's underlings. Morena does not force her to join the Heil-Ly, but rather, strongarms Borksen into agreeing to play a negotiation game. Borksen ends the game having fulfilled two of the three criteria to be a Heil-Ly member. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 409 , with the second criteria being fulfilled because Borksen chose to cheat during the game. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 410 
Shortly before special martial law is declared: Perhaps coincidentally, Zhang Lei heads to Tier 2 through Onior's residence, and is speculated to be hiding in the Justice Bureau. 
Mid-negotiation game: An announcement is played throughout the Black Whale, announcing that Special Martial Law has been declared. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 408 Tiers 4 and 5 are notified that their lives are generally unaffected. Tiers 3, 2, and 1 are given instructions to comply with the military, with varying strictness based off the importance of the residents of the tier. The bulkhead between Tiers 2 and 3 is shut. 
40 minutes after special martial law is declared: Benjamin meets with Mizaistom, Botobai, and Kaiser, and instruct them to be his witnesses to the legitimacy of his special martial law declaration. He believes himself to have a 9h30min time window to act and declare his illegitimate child the official successor to the throne. 

References
